summary: The entrance hall is finished in a contemporary style and appears generally clean, bright and well maintained. Decoration is predominantly neutral with white painted walls, white skirting/trim and wood-effect flooring, with integrated lighting and multiple wall control plates. Overall condition is good with only light scuffs and minor surface marks visible in places, and no significant damage noted in the supplied photographs.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth painted ceiling in white, with recessed downlights and a smoke alarm/heat alarm fitted centrally in the hall area.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Smooth painted walls in white/very pale magnolia finish throughout the entrance hall.
defects: light scuff marks mid level to walls
minor surface marks low to mid level on wall faces

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards fitted around the perimeter of the hall.

items.name: Door frame and architrave
items.description: White painted door linings and architraves to the hall openings.

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Metallic threshold strip at the entrance transition between the hall flooring and adjoining carpeted area.

items.name: Wood-effect laminate flooring
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring laid in the entrance hall and corridor areas.
defects: minor wear/scuffing visible to surface in places

items.name: Entrance door
items.description: Internal entrance door in walnut-effect wood finish with brass-coloured ironmongery, letter plate and viewer/lock set.
defects: light wear to lower letter plate area
minor surface marks visible to door face

items.name: Internal door
items.description: White painted internal door visible to the right-hand side of the hall.

items.name: Built-in storage cupboard
items.description: Recessed built-in cupboard/void with white painted interior and wood-effect shelf/ledge, fitted with hanging rail and coat hangers beneath.
defects: minor speckling/marking to underside of shelf area

items.name: Coat hangers x10
items.description: Assorted black clothes hangers on the built-in cupboard rail.

items.name: Wall-mounted control panels
items.description: Three wall-mounted controls in brushed metal/black finish, including a digital touchscreen control panel and two switch plates.

items.name: Electrical socket plates
items.description: Multiple brushed metal electrical socket plates fitted to the hall walls, including double and triple plates.

items.name: Light switches
items.description: Wall-mounted light switch plates in brushed metal finish.

items.name: Recessed downlights
items.description: Recessed ceiling downlights in the entrance hall ceiling.

items.name: Smoke alarm
items.description: White ceiling-mounted smoke alarm fitted centrally in the hall.

items.name: Thermostat/control display
items.description: Wall-mounted digital control display with blue illuminated screen.

items.name: Decorative mirror/frame
items.description: Tall narrow black framed mirror or framed panel leaning against the wall in the corridor area, partially visible.

items.name: Small card/paper leaflet
items.description: Loose paper/card leaflet lying on the floor at the base of the entrance door.
defects: item lying on floor at door threshold
